mapper.select: SELECT order_id AS orderId, order_number AS orderNumber, total_price AS totalPrice, order_status AS orderStatus FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payments WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND payment_status = '성공'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments (order_id, amount, payment_method, payment_status, fail_reason) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{amount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentStatus}, #{failReason})
